features: Natural witch hazel postpartum pads - Soothing perineal care crafted from 100% cotton, our maternity pads use witch hazel to provide instant relief for postpartum soreness, perineal tearing, and haemorrhoid discomfort. Extra-moist 120 gsm discs stay refreshingly moist longer for lasting comfort.

Hassle-free flip-top tub – Travel & hospital bag essential, keep your postnatal kit stocked with these hygienic, pre-moistened wipes. The sturdy, reusable tub with flip-lid locks in freshness and fits neatly into your hospital bag or nursery drawer for on-the-go haemorrhoid or post-birth relief.

Multi-Use postnatal & piles relief pads. From perineal swelling and episiotomy soothing to hemorrhoid relief, simply nestle a pad into your maternity underwear—or chill for perineal cooling pads that instantly calm skin.

Versatile astringent pads for skin irritations beyond postpartum care, these witch hazel wipes double as rash relief and spot treatment. Ideal for bug bites, grazes, and blemishes, their unique design keeps liquid close to skin, maximising natural astringent benefits.
Eco-conscious & cruelty-free. Proudly made in the UK with 95% recycled packaging. Free from parabens and animal testing - your choice for gentle, planet-friendly postpartum recovery.
